channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: The Chameleon Edition - gemini-faf-mcp v2.4.0
item.description: TL;DR: gemini-faf-mcp now auto-selects its transport — stdio locally, Streamable HTTP on Cloud Run. Same binary, 12 tools, zero config. One binary that's a local MCP server and a hosted one,...

item.title: Build Your Own AI Assistant on WordPress + Telegram (OpenClaw Alternative, Self-Hosted)
item.description: WordPress 7.0 quietly shipped three AI APIs that nobody outside the core community seems to be talking about. Here's a practical walkthrough of what's possible. Why bother when ChatGPT exists?...

item.title: OpenSparrow v2.7 – Enhanced RAG, rebuilt admin UI, and Automations (beta)
item.description: v2.7 is out. This release focuses on AI improvements, a major admin UI overhaul, and the first iteration of workflow automations. RAG enhancements The AI module got a significant upgrade. Better...

item.title: How To Reduce Digital Distractions While Working
item.description: Introduction In today’s hyper-connected world, distractions abound, especially when we’re trying to focus on work. Notifications from smartphones, endless browser tabs, and social media alerts can...

item.title: Square Enix announces Kingdom Hearts 4
item.description: A different kind of Sora is back in the news. Square Enix just teased the long-awaited next entry in the Kingdom Hearts series, though there's not much in the way of info just yet. It's called...

item.title: Meta will use your activity on other websites to personalize your feeds
item.description: Meta is planning to use the data shared by other businesses to personalize your feed and its AI responses. In a blog post on Tuesday, Meta explains that it already uses your off-platform activity,...

item.title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time is getting a remake for the Switch 2
item.description: Nintendo announced a remake of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time during its Nintendo Direct presentation on Tuesday. It will launch sometime in 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2. More details will be...

item.title: Microsoft AI chief walks back comments about AI taking over white-collar work
item.description: Microsoft AI head Mustafa Suleyman is walking back his statement about AI automating jobs done by white-collar workers, including lawyers, accountants, and project managers. During an episode of...

item.title: Apple’s AI promises are finally, almost, sort of here
item.description: Apple kicked off its annual developer conference with bold promises about AI. The company, CEO Tim Cook said, would be "introducing new technologies and innovations that push the limits on what's...

item.title: Everything you need to know about Prime Day 2026
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is getting closer, and it’s possible you might have some questions about the sale. When does it start? Why is it in June instead of July? And, most importantly, when will the...

item.title: Sandstone raises $30M to bring AI to in-house legal teams
item.description: Sandstone's Series A was led by Lightspeed Partners, with participation from Sequoia.

item.title: Nintendo Direct June 2026: All the news and trailers

item.title: Apple’s best AI idea looks a lot like vibe coding
item.description: Most of Apple's current AI ideas are roughly the same as everyone else's AI ideas. A chatbot you can ask questions; quick ways to create or summarize text; bizarre, borderline creepy...

item.title: Apple dials down Liquid Glass, and the Mac looks way better for it
item.description: MacOS 27 Golden Gate will usher in a bunch of changes to the Mac when it's released later this year, with its biggest new features revolving around Siri AI. But for now, using the first developer...

item.title: Lovable says it has hit $500M in annualized revenue, with 1 million new projects a week
item.description: Lovable says it has now surpassed $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue and its users are building businesses and replacing internal software.

item.title: The Rivian R2 is too much fun to let drive itself
item.description: Rivian may be all in on robotaxis and autonomy, but it's still got human drivers - and EV buyers - to win over. The pricey R1S SUV and R1T pickup brought Rivian A-list media attention and cult-hit...

item.title: WinRAR Flaw Exploited by Russia-Aligned Groups to Deploy Stealers in Ukraine
item.description: Two Russia-aligned cyber attack campaigns have continued to exploit a security flaw in WinRAR to target Ukrainian organisations, almost a year after patches for the vulnerability were released....

item.title: The Download: whole-body rejuvenation drugs and five things to know about AI
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. David Sinclair plans to test whole-body rejuvenation drugs...

item.title: How an e-scooter founder raised $5 million to build space data centers
item.description: Orbital founder Euwyn Poon built 250,000 scooters at Spin. Now he wants to launch 10,000 space data centers.

item.title: Researchers Build Self-Replicating AI Worm That Operates Entirely on Local, Open-Weight Models
item.description: University of Toronto researchers have built and tested a proof-of-concept AI-driven computer worm that uses a locally hosted open-weight large language model to reason its way through a network,...

item.title: Chrome V8 Zero-Day CVE-2026-11645 Exploited in the Wild - Patch Now
item.description: Google has released security updates to address 74 vulnerabilities, including one that has come under active exploitation in the wild. The high-severity vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-11645...

item.title: The Hidden Security Risk in Modern Networks: The Work Between Tools

item.title: How an Agent Built a 3D Paris Gallery by Chaining Two Hugging Face Spaces
